mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO visitor_reservation_sync ( reservation_id, visitor_name, visitor_phone, visitor_id_card, pass_dep, car_number, vip_type_name, park_name, pass_name, apply_state_name, apply_from_name, start_time, end_time, gateway_transit_begin_time, gateway_transit_end_time, remark1, remark2, remark3, data_hash, vip_opened, api_called, external_create_time, person_visit_status, person_visit_times, car_visit_status, car_visit_times ) VALUES
( #{item.reservationId}, #{item.visitorName}, #{item.visitorPhone}, #{item.visitorIdCard}, #{item.passDep}, #{item.carNumber}, #{item.vipTypeName}, #{item.parkName}, #{item.passName}, #{item.applyStateName}, #{item.applyFromName}, #{item.startTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.gatewayTransitBeginTime}, #{item.gatewayTransitEndTime}, #{item.remark1}, #{item.remark2}, #{item.remark3}, #{item.dataHash}, #{item.vipOpened}, #{item.apiCalled}, #{item.externalCreateTime}, #{item.personVisitStatus}, #{item.personVisitTimes}, #{item.carVisitStatus}, #{item.carVisitTimes} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE visitor_name = VALUES(visitor_name), visitor_phone = VALUES(visitor_phone), visitor_id_card = VALUES(visitor_id_card), pass_dep = VALUES(pass_dep), car_number = VALUES(car_number), vip_type_name = VALUES(vip_type_name), park_name = VALUES(park_name), pass_name = VALUES(pass_name), apply_state_name = VALUES(apply_state_name), apply_from_name = VALUES(apply_from_name), start_time = VALUES(start_time), end_time = VALUES(end_time), gateway_transit_begin_time = VALUES(gateway_transit_begin_time), gateway_transit_end_time = VALUES(gateway_transit_end_time), remark1 = VALUES(remark1), remark2 = VALUES(remark2), remark3 = VALUES(remark3), data_hash = VALUES(data_hash), vip_opened = VALUES(vip_opened), -- 如果数据发生变化（data_hash不同），则重置api_called=0，否则保持原值 api_called = IF(VALUES(data_hash) != data_hash, 0, COALESCE(api_called, 0)), external_create_time = VALUES(external_create_time), person_visit_status = VALUES(person_visit_status), person_visit_times = VALUES(person_visit_times), car_visit_status = VALUES(car_visit_status), car_visit_times = VALUES(car_visit_times), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM visitor_reservation_sync WHERE deleted = 0 AND reservation_id IN
#{id}
SELECT reservation_id as reservationId, data_hash as dataHash FROM visitor_reservation_sync WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE visitor_reservation_sync SET deleted = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE reservation_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT car_number FROM visitor_reservation_sync WHERE deleted = 0 AND visitor_name = #{visitorName} AND car_number IS NOT NULL AND car_number != '' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM visitor_reservation_sync WHERE deleted = 0 AND visitor_name = #{visitorName} AND ( -- 优先使用网关通行时间进行匹配 (gateway_transit_begin_time IS NOT NULL AND gateway_transit_end_time IS NOT NULL AND #{eventTime} >= gateway_transit_begin_time AND #{eventTime} <= gateway_transit_end_time) OR -- 如果没有网关通行时间，则使用预约时间进行匹配 ((gateway_transit_begin_time IS NULL OR gateway_transit_end_time IS NULL) AND start_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time IS NOT NULL AND #{eventTime} >= start_time AND #{eventTime} <= end_time) ) ORDER BY -- 优先返回有时间范围限制的记录（网关通行时间 > 预约时间） CASE WHEN gateway_transit_begin_time IS NOT NULL AND gateway_transit_end_time IS NOT NULL THEN 0 WHEN start_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, create_time DESC LIMIT 1
